title: The `from` keyword rendered as it appears in a Precept file — monospace font, keyword blue, terminal dark background. `from` begins every transition rule, anchoring the rule to a specific state.
conceptualBridge: The `from` code token means Precept's transitions are anchored to specific states because every rule begins with `from [State]` — declaring that the governed behavior only applies within an exact, bounded context.
decision: Rejected: legibility hard fail at 32px (score 2.5) — four characters illegible at icon scale; `from` is also a common English word with weaker brand association than `->`. The operator is the right representative for this direction.
